rationale: Diff contains only .ddx execution metadata (manifest.json, result.json). No source code or tests implementing audit lineage, intent/entity ID queries, approval/rejection metadata, or redacted audit reads are present to evaluate against any acceptance criterion.

findings.summary: No implementation present: diff adds only execution metadata files; acceptance criteria require audit lineage code and tests that are absent.
No tests demonstrating lineage queryable by intent ID and entity ID.
No approval/rejection metadata (actor, agent/tool, policy version, approver reason, intent ID, pre/post images) recorded in audit.
No FEAT-029 redaction applied to audit reads to match entity read redaction.
